alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: User {{actor_displayName_s}} ({{actor_alternateId_s}}) registered a device from {{client_ipAddress_s}} and the IP is associated with malicious activity in Okta ThreatInsight.

properties.name: Device Registration from Malicious IP
properties.description: This rule identifies successful Okta device registration events that originate from IP addresses also observed by Okta ThreatInsight as malicious or suspicious.
